zh.Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾莫爾 普斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Gould於1435年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特澤亞波洛時，他的父親Robert Gould31歲，母親Idonea Mycheldever25歲。他於1449年與Eleanor在英國英格蘭賀特福爾波文格頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1502年5月5日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特澤亞波洛。

zh-hans.Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾莫爾 普斯亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Gould于1435年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特澤亞波洛时，他的父亲Robert Gould31岁，母亲Idonea Mycheldever25岁。他于1449年与Eleanor在英国英格兰賀特福爾波文格頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1502年5月5日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特澤亞波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Gould
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gold
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Meyer, Mayer, Hyman, Ari, Avram, Mendel, Moshe, Shraga, Aviva.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Gold, Yiddish gold ‘gold’. In North America it is often a shortened form of one of the many compound artificial names of which Gold is the first element.

English and German: from Middle English go(u)ld, or Old English and Old High German gold ‘gold’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for someone who worked in gold, i.e. a refiner, jeweler, or gilder, or as a nickname for someone who either had many gold possessions or bright yellow hair.

variants.name: Guild
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Gould was born in 1435, in Seaborough, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Gould, was 31 and his mother, Idonea Mycheldever, was 25. He married Eleanor in 1449, in Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 5 May 1502, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Seaborough, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Gould est né en 1435, à Seaborough, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Gould, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Idonea Mycheldever, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor en 1449, à Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 5 mai 1502, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Seaborough, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Gould 1435 in Seaborough, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Gould 31 und seine Mutter Idonea Mycheldever 25. Er hat 1449 in Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 5. Mai 1502 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Seaborough, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gould è nato il nel 1435 nel Seaborough, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Gould, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Idonea Mycheldever, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor nel 1449, nel Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 5 maggio 1502, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Seaborough, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Gouldが1435年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトセアボロウで生まれた時，父Robert Gouldは31歳，母Idonea Mycheldeverは25歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアボヴィングドンでEleanorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1502年5月5日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトセアボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Gould(이)가 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Gould(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonea Mycheldever(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 보빙던에서 Eleanor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1502년 5월 5일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 시버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.liv. 1436: de 10 de janeiro de 1436 a 9 de janeiro de 1437
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Gould nasceu em 1435, em Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Gould, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Idonea Mycheldever, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor em 1449, em Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 5 de maio de 1502, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Gould родился в 1435 г. в местности сибороую, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Gould было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Idonea Mycheldever, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor в 1449 г. в местности бовингдон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 5 мая 1502 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности сибороую, сомирсет, Англия.

es.liv. 1436: desde 10 de enero de 1436 hasta 9 de enero de 1437
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Gould nació en 1435, en Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Gould, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Idonea Mycheldever, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Eleanor en 1449, en Bovingdon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1502, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra.
